stories.title: Red Sox Win 12th Straight — Comeback From 6-3 Down
stories.angle: They trailed by three runs with three innings left and still won. The 11-game streak was the story yesterday. The comeback is the story today — and it's a better one.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Boston trailed 6-3 entering the 7th inning Saturday night.

They won 7-6.

Wilyer Abreu 2-run HR. Jahmai Jones HR in his first start after the trade.

The Red Sox streak is at 12. Franchise's longest since June 2006. #RedSox #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Wilyer Abreu has 4 home runs in his last 2 games.

The Red Sox just won their 12th consecutive game on a comeback win — trailed by 3 entering the 7th.

Boston is 49-48. One game over .500 for the first time since April.

This thing is real. #RedSox #MLB

article.headline: The Red Sox Trailed by Three in the 7th and Won Anyway. That's 12 in a Row.

stories.title: Dodgers-Yankees Doubleheader TODAY
stories.angle: Two games in one day between the best team in baseball and the most storied franchise in the sport. Game 1 at noon, Game 2 in prime time on NBC. This is today's event.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The Dodgers-Yankees game was rained out Saturday.

They rescheduled it. Now it's two games in one day.

Game 1: 12:35 PM ET
Game 2: 7:20 PM ET on NBC/Peacock

First time these franchises have met since the 2024 World Series. Dodgers: 62-36. #Dodgers #Yankees #MLB

article.headline: The Rain Made It Better. Dodgers-Yankees Doubleheader Is Today.

stories.title: Mets Are Selling — Francisco Lindor Is On The Market
stories.angle: When a team trades its franchise shortstop, it's not selling. It's blowing the whole thing up. The Mets are doing something bigger than a deadline sell.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Mets are selling.

Francisco Lindor — signed through 2031 — is reportedly available.

They're protecting Juan Soto and their top pitching prospects. Everything else is on the table.

15 days to August 3. The Mets are blowing it up. #Mets #MLB

article.headline: The Mets Are Selling. Francisco Lindor — Signed Through 2031 — Is Available.

stories.title: Skubal Wants to Stay — Tigers Inclined to Hold Their Ace
stories.angle: Yesterday the trade felt inevitable. Today the Tigers are the ones making it complicated. Their ace doesn't want to leave, and the front office is starting to listen.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Tarik Skubal has told people close to him he wants to stay in Detroit.

He believes the Tigers can win the World Series.

And the Tigers are increasingly inclined to let him stay.

15 days to August 3. The Cubs, Braves, and Rays are all still calling. #Tigers #MLB

article.headline: Tarik Skubal Wants to Stay in Detroit. The Tigers Might Actually Let Him.

stories.title: AL Wild Card Race — Red Sox Surge Changes Everything
stories.angle: One week ago the Red Sox weren't in this picture. Now they're tied for the final spot and coming off a comeback win. The AL Wild Card race just got four teams and no margin.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
AL Wild Card picture entering Sunday:

Wild Card 1: Yankees 54-43
Wild Card 2: Guardians 51-46
Wild Card 3 (tied): Twins 49-49 / Red Sox 49-48

The Red Sox have won 12 straight. Two weeks ago they weren't in this conversation.

Now they are. #MLB

article.headline: Four Teams. Three Spots. The AL Wild Card Race Just Got Real.
